message:
🐛 Switch GitHub stats to shields.io JSON endpoints (#1305)

Replace direct api.github.com calls with shields.io JSON endpoints
(e.g. img.shields.io/github/stars/kubestellar/console.json). Shields.io
handles GitHub API caching on their side, so visitors never hit the
60 req/hr unauthenticated rate limit that caused the dropdown to show
zeros.

Closes #1300

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
